chain.thought: Explanation: In 2008 her throws were 71.00 m and 71.40 m (best 71.40 m). In 2009 her throws were 72.85 m, 74.79 m, and 70.45 m (best 74.79 m). Since 74.79 m > 71.40 m, she threw more meters in 2009.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
From the table, her recorded throws in 2008 were 71.00 m and 71.40 m (best 71.40 m). In 2009, they were 72.85 m, 74.79 m, and 70.45 m (best 74.79 m). Since 74.79 m (2009) is greater than 71.40 m (2008), she threw more meters in 2009.
